input: USPS: Your package is held due to an unpaid fee. Verify now: http://usps-track-secure.example
FedEx notice: delivery failed. Confirm your address and card details before 6 PM: https://fedex-redelivery-check.example
Your parcel is waiting at customs. Pay the $2.14 clearance fee here: http://customs-parcel-pay.example
UPS: We cannot deliver your item until you update your login information: https://ups-account-update.example
Postal Service: final attempt today. Your package will be returned unless you verify your details: http://post-office-secure.example
DHL Express: tax unpaid. Pay now or your package will be destroyed: https://dhl-tax-release.example
Your Amazon order is delayed. Confirm payment at https://amazon-billing-help.example to avoid cancellation.
Package Center: incomplete address. Enter your full name, birth date, and card number here: http://delivery-address-fix.example
Bank alert: your account is locked. Login immediately to restore access: https://secure-bank-restore.example
Fraud department: unusual transfer detected. Verify your password and one-time code now: http://fraud-review-bank.example
Your debit card will be suspended in 30 minutes. Confirm your PIN here: https://card-security-check.example
Security notice: we blocked a $940 wire. Reply with your full card number to cancel it.
Your mobile banking profile expires today. Re-enroll at http://mobile-bank-profile.example
Credit union support: your account has been flagged. Send your username so we can verify ownership.
Payment failed. Update your wallet seed phrase to keep your funds safe: https://wallet-support-reset.example
Zelle support: a $1,200 transfer is pending. To cancel, send $1 to yourself using the instructions at https://zelle-cancel-flow.example
Hi Grandma, I lost my phone. This is my new number. Can you send $800 for rent today? Please don't tell Mom.
Mom it's me. I got in a wreck and need bail money. Please wire $1,500 now and don't call anyone.
Grandpa, my phone broke. Text me on this number only. I need help paying a bill before midnight.
Auntie please don't tell Dad. I need gift cards for an emergency and I'll pay you back tomorrow.
This is your son using a friend's phone. I am stranded. Can you send crypto to this wallet right away?
Hi, this is your niece. I changed numbers. Can you send me the code that just came to your phone?
Grandma I am in trouble. Please send money through Zelle today. I cannot talk on the phone.
This is your manager. I need you to buy three gift cards immediately and send me the codes. I am in a meeting.
Can you do me a favor? Pick up $500 in Apple cards and scratch the backs. I need the photos ASAP.
Past-due tax notice: settle today with prepaid cards to avoid legal action.
Your computer repair invoice must be paid with Google Play cards before service can continue.
School fundraiser urgent: send gift card codes to this temporary number so your child keeps their spot.
Payroll issue: buy $300 in Steam cards and email the codes to verify your direct deposit.
I am the pastor. A family needs help now. Please send the gift card numbers to this phone.
Microsoft Security: your device is infected. Call the support number on this message within 10 minutes.
Your antivirus subscription renewed for $399. To cancel, download the refund tool: http://refund-support-tool.example
Apple support: we found hackers on your iCloud. Reply with the 6-digit code to remove them.
Browser warning: your files are being deleted. Call certified support now at the number shown here.
Geek Help Desk invoice: $289 charge approved. If this was not you, call this number for a refund.
Congratulations! You won an iPhone. Pay a $9.99 shipping fee here: https://winner-shipping.example
Lottery office: your unclaimed prize is ready. Send your bank login so we can deposit winnings.
You have been selected for a government grant. Processing fee required by midnight: http://grant-release.example
Claim your free vacation now. We only need your card number to hold the reservation.
Final notice: your reward points expire today. Login at https://points-claim-center.example to cash out.
I feel so close to you. My wallet was stolen while traveling. Can you send $300 so I can get home?
I want to visit you, but the travel agent needs payment today. Please send it by wire transfer.
Do not tell your family about us yet. I need help with a hospital bill before we can meet.
Remote job approved. Deposit this check and send part of it to the equipment vendor today.
You are hired. Pay a refundable $75 onboarding fee at https://newhire-start.example to unlock training.
Your account needs attention. Visit http://account-message-center.example when you have time.
We could not process your request. Open https://customer-resolution.example for details.
Your profile is incomplete. Confirm your information here: http://profile-update-center.example
Please review the secure document I shared: https://document-viewer-secure.example
Your voicemail is available at http://voice-message-download.example
Please call me back immediately about your account. This cannot wait.
Your subscription has a problem. We need confirmation today or it may be closed.
Final reminder: your paperwork is missing. Send your details by end of day.
Action required: confirm ownership of your account within 24 hours.
We noticed an issue with your delivery. Respond quickly so we can resolve it.
Hi, this is support. We need to confirm your billing info.
This is the office. Please send your date of birth so we can update your file.
Your invoice is attached. Open it and enter the requested information.
We tried reaching you. Use this temporary number from now on.
I am from payroll. Confirm your direct deposit account today.
I want to buy your item. I will send extra money and my mover will pick it up.
Can you verify you are real by sending me the code I just texted you?
I only use this escrow service for marketplace purchases: https://safe-escrow-pay.example
The courier needs a small insurance payment before pickup. I will reimburse you.
I am out of town but my assistant will handle payment. Please email your bank name.
Bank fraud alert: Did you attempt a $249.00 purchase at TARGET? Reply YES or NO.
Your bank card ending 1234 was used for $18.42 at Grocery Store. If this was not you, call the number on your card.
Credit union alert: new login from a browser. Open your banking app directly if this was not you.
Your statement is ready. Log in through the official app to view it.
A transfer is scheduled for tomorrow. If you did not schedule this, contact customer service using the number on your card.
UPS update: your package is out for delivery today. Track it in the UPS app.
FedEx delivery exception: weather delay reported. Check status on the official FedEx site.
Your pharmacy order shipped. Open your pharmacy account if you need details.
A package requiring signature is scheduled for tomorrow. No reply needed.
Your store pickup is ready. Bring your ID and order confirmation to the service desk.
Reminder: dental appointment tomorrow at 2 PM. Call the office number you already have if you need to reschedule.
Your lab results are available in the patient portal. Log in through the clinic website.
Insurance notice: a claim was processed. Review it in your official member portal.
Your password was changed. If this was not you, open the app directly and review account security.
Your verification code is 482910. Do not share this code with anyone.
New device added to your account. Visit your account settings through the official app if this was not you.
School reminder: permission forms are due Friday. Check the parent portal for details.
Library notice: your borrowed item is overdue. Log in to your library account to renew.
Your utility bill is ready. No payment is due until next week. View it through your normal account.
Payment reminder from your subscription service. If unsure, open the official app instead of using message links.
Running ten minutes late. See you at the restaurant soon.
Can you bring milk on the way home?
Happy birthday! Hope you have a great day.
The meeting moved to 3 PM. Same room as before.
Dinner is at our house Saturday. No need to bring anything.
Please review the agenda before our team call tomorrow.
The report draft is in the shared project folder.
I moved the deadline to Monday so everyone has more time.
Thanks for sending the notes. I added two comments.
Reminder: the office is closed Friday for the holiday.
Weekend sale: 20 percent off selected items in store.
Your coffee shop rewards balance updated after your last visit.
New class schedule posted for next month.
Your local bookstore has your preorder ready at the counter.
Thanks for your purchase. Your receipt is available in your account.
